## Summary

Describe the focused change and the problem it solves.

## Change type

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Improvement to an existing agent
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Installer, conversion, or integration fix
- [ ] Tests, validation, or maintenance

## Validation

Explain how you tested the change. Include relevant commands and results.

```text
# Add sanitised validation output here
```

## Safety, privacy, and quality checks

- [ ] I read and followed `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated bulk edits.
- [ ] I did not commit generated integration output or build artefacts.
- [ ] I did not include API keys, credentials, customer data, personal information, private repository details, or internal infrastructure values.
- [ ] New claims, links, examples, metrics, and compatibility statements are accurate and verifiable.
- [ ] Agent instructions do not contain concealed payloads, malicious prompt injection, unsafe data collection, or instructions that override user control.
- [ ] Relevant lint, conversion, originality, division, and tool checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behaviour or compatibility changed.

## Related issue or discussion

Link the relevant issue or discussion. Broad architectural or multi-file proposals should have prior community discussion.

## Screenshots or examples

Add non-sensitive examples when they help reviewers understand the change.
